film.title: Iron Will
film.overview: When Will Stoneman's father dies, he is left alone to take care of his mother and their land. Needing money to maintain it, he decides to join a cross country dogsled race. This race will require days of racing for long hours, through harsh weather and terrain. This young man will need a lot of courage and a strong will to complete this race.

dialogues.dialogue: Well, did you get in?  Yes, sir.  You got in! Oh, I'm so proud of you!  - I'm not goin', Dad. - What? Wha--  - I'm not goin'. - What are you talking about? Of course--

I see. Well, charming.  And how does Mr Stoneman feel about young Will racing?  His father's very proud of him.  Tell Kingsley I've got an angle for him.  Iron Will races to save mother's farm and go to college.
